Start Here

New here? Welcome. No Spoons Wasted is a resource for people navigating daily life with chronic illness. We use Spoon Theory as a framework to express what it’s like to live daily life for the spoonie community.

Before you dive into the blog, these five guides will give you the foundation for Spoon Theory and what it means to live the Spoonie Life.

What Is Spoon Theory?

The framework that explains chronic illness energy in a way healthy people can actually understand. If you're new to the spoonie community, start here.

Read article →

Who Is a Spoonie?

Who uses this term, where it came from, and why it matters to the chronic illness community.

Read article →
Coming Soon

What Does Low Spoon Mean?

A plain-language breakdown of what it actually feels like when your energy runs out.

Coming Soon

How to Plan Meals With Chronic Fatigue

Practical strategies for feeding yourself on the days you have nothing left.

Coming Soon

What to Keep in a Spoonie Pantry

The ingredients and shortcuts that make low-energy cooking possible.

Ready to explore? Browse all posts →

Hi, I'm Twila.

I created No Spoons Wasted as a resource for fellow spoonies navigating life with low energy. The blog provides recipes, strategies, and products for the days when you just can't.
